allow: Bash(python -c "import sqlite3; conn = sqlite3.connect\('data/processed/metrics.db'\); cur = conn.cursor\(\); cur.execute\(\\"SELECT name FROM sqlite_master WHERE type='table'\\"\); tables = cur.fetchall\(\); print\('Tables:', tables\); cur.execute\('PRAGMA table_info\(metrics_daily\)'\); print\('Columns:', cur.fetchall\(\)\); conn.close\(\)")
